description_long: This doll features a large, spherical head with a matte black finish and a glossy, blood-red circular faceplate that appears almost mask-like. The body is short and rounded, with stubby arms and legs, and is covered in a red, veined texture that gives the appearance of cracked or marbled glass. The doll stands on a hexagonal, grayish-blue base that is splattered with red, suggesting a dramatic or horror-inspired theme. The surface of the head is smooth and slightly reflective, while the body has a more irregular, glossy texture. There are no visible facial features, clothing details, or accessories, giving the doll a mysterious and somewhat ominous presence. The overall design is stylized and abstract, with a focus on bold color contrasts and textural variety.
description: A stylized doll with a large matte black head, glossy red faceplate, and a veined red body, standing on a hexagonal base. The design is abstract and dramatic, with no visible facial features or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the glossy red faceplate, veined red body, and hexagonal base clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the spherical matte black head and the thickness of the faceplate, with the body and base visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, uninterrupted matte black head and the back of the veined red body, with the base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the spherical head and the layered faceplate, with the body and base in profile.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll does not wear any visible clothing; its body is covered in a red, veined, marbled texture that mimics the appearance of cracked glass or resin.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms slightly bent and extended downward at its sides, legs apart, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present; the face is a blank, glossy red circular plate.
attribute_hair_style: No hair is present; the head is a smooth, matte black sphere.
